mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, realname, role, status FROM sys_user ORDER BY role, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, realname, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realname}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND role != 'admin'
